CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Shamuel Academy, Chaiwa joined the Zambian club Atletico Lusaka on loan in 2022. He transferred to the Swiss club Young Boys on 14 June 2022, signing a 4-year contract.On 14 February 2024, Chaiwa moved on loan to Schaffhausen.
CONTENT.Personal life: Chaiwa's father, Changa was also a professional footballer in Zambia.
CONTENT.External links: Miguel Chaiwa at SoccerwayMiguel Chaiwa at National-Football-Teams.comMiguel Chaiwa at FootballDatabase.euMiguel Chaiwa at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Chaiwa is a youth international for Zambia, having represented the Zambia U17s in 2019 and 2020. He debuted for the senior Zambia national team in a friendly 3–1 loss to Iraq on 20 March 2022.

SUMMARY: Miguel Changa Chaiwa (born 7 June 2004) is a Zambian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Swiss Challenge League club Schaffhausen on loan from Young Boys, and the Zambia national team.
